zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine Herbert於1502年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞時，她的父親Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas60歲，母親Lady Margred Gwilym32歲。她於大約1514年與Richard de Croft II在英國賀福爾卡芙特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1574年在英國英格蘭賀福爾卡芙特享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catherine Herbert于1502年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞时，她的父亲Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas60岁，母亲Lady Margred Gwilym32岁。她于大约1514年与Richard de Croft II在英国賀福爾卡芙特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1574年在英国英格兰賀福爾卡芙特享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English, and French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In Britain, this Old French name, introduced by the Normans, reinforced the less common Old English cognate Herebeorht. The surname was taken to Ireland after the Anglo-Norman invasion and in the 16th century.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the German personal name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Harbison
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name Herbert (the change from -er- to -ar- was a common one in Old French and Middle English). An intrusive n later gave Harbinson .

variants.name: Hebard
meanings: English (Surrey):
variant of Herbert , with assimilation of the first r. Compare Hebb .
variant of   Hibbert  .

variants.name: Harbert
meanings: German and English: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbers
meanings: German and Dutch: patronymic from   Herbert  . It is found mainly in Lower Saxony and across the Dutch border.

variants.name: Dickherber
meanings: Probably a nickname for a fat person by the name of Herbert , of which Herber is a short form, or, more likely, in the north from Die(c)kherber, a topographic and distinguishing name for a Herber living by the dike, see Dicke 2. Compare Dickmeyer .

variants.name: Hebert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Lucien, Michel, Gaston, Alcide, Camille.
French (Hébert): assimilated form of Herbert . Compare Abair , Abar , Abare , Abear , Aber , Eber , and Ebert .
German: variant of   Heber   1.

variants.name: Herber
meanings: German and Dutch: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbertson
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name   Herbert  .

variants.name: Hebb
meanings: English (East Yorkshire and northeast Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Hebb, Ebb, pet forms of Herbert .

variants.name: Herb
meanings: South German: nickname for a harsh or rough person, from Middle High German herb ‘tart, harsh’.
German: from the personal name Herpo, a pet form of Herbert .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catharine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine Herbert was born in 1502, in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas, was 60 and her mother, Lady Margred Gwilym, was 32. She married Richard de Croft II about 1514, in Croft, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1574, in Croft, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr., Mathavarn, Montgomery, Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine Herbert est née en 1502, à Swansea, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Lady Margred Gwilym, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Croft II environ 1514, à Croft, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1574, à Croft, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catherine Herbert 1502 in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas 60 und ihre Mutter Lady Margred Gwilym 32. Sie hat um 1514 in Croft, Herefordshire, England Richard de Croft II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1574 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Croft, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Herbert è nata il nel 1502 nel Swansea, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Lady Margred Gwilym, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Croft II circa 1514, nel Croft, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1574, nel Croft, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Herbertが1502年にウェールズグラモーガンスワンセアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyasは60歳，母Lady Margred Gwilymは32歳であった。約1514年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクロフトでRichard de Croft IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1574年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクロフトで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Herbert(이)가 1502년 웨일스 글램르건 스완시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margred Gwilym(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1514년 영국 허퍼드실르 크로프트에서 Richard de Croft II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1574년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 크로프트에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Herbert nasceu em 1502, em Swansea, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margred Gwilym, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Croft II aproximadamente 1514, em Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1574, em Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine Herbert родилась в 1502 г. в местности свансеа, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margred Gwilym, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Croft II около 1514 г. в местности крофт, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1574 г. в местности крофт, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Catherine Herbert nació en 1502, en Swansea, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Sir Richard Herbert of Ewyas, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Lady Margred Gwilym, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Richard de Croft II aproximadamente 1514, en Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1574, en Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
